page_title: The Danube — Budapest to Passau | Alpen Glow Tours and Travels
title: The Danube — Budapest to Passau
overview_paragraphs: A European river cruise solves the usual multi-city headache — pack once, and wake up in a new country every morning while the ship does the moving overnight. This route follows the Danube through three capitals, each one stepping off the boat directly into an old town built long before cars existed.
Ideal for travelers who want multiple European countries without repeated flights, packing, or hotel changes.
inclusions: Guided shore excursions in each port
